ocr.text: In the Lending Platform Metrics for Q4 FY2023, the Total Loans Issued amounted to 500M CAD, with a Default Rate of 2.5%,
an Average Loan Size of 25,000 CAD, Number of Borrowers at 20,000, a Loan Approval Rate of 85%, and a Repayment Rate
of 95%. The subsequent row indicated 450M CAD in Total Loans Issued, a Default Rate of 2.8%, Average Loan Size of 22,000
CAD, Number of Borrowers at 18,500, Loan Approval Rate of 87%, and Repayment Rate of 93%. The third row reported
550M CAD in Total Loans Issued, a Default Rate of 2.3%, an Average Loan Size of 26,000 CAD, Number of Borrowers at
21,000, Loan Approval Rate of 84%, and Repayment Rate of 96%.

The final row showed 600M CAD in Total Loans Issued, a Default Rate of 2.1%, Average Loan Size of 28,000 CAD, Number
of Borrowers at 22,500, Loan Approval Rate of 90%, and Repayment Rate of 94%. For Total Transactions, the Transaction
Volume was 75M CAD, with Fees Collected at 18%, Customer Satisfaction at 86%, and Average Processing Time as Total.

In the Transaction Overview for FY2023, Credit Cards accounted for 35M CAD with a Growth Rate of 15% and 40M
transactions processed; Debit Cards represented 20M CAD with a 10% Growth Rate and 22M transactions; E-Wallets totaled
15M CAD with a 25% Growth Rate and 18M transactions; Bank Transfers were 5M CAD with a 5% Growth Rate and 6M
transactions, culminating in a Total Volume of 75M CAD, an 18% Growth Rate, and 86M transactions, with an Average
Transaction Value set at $1,000.
